name: WAL-L710 PAR W-DMx

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: EBB7E746-3A8F-440F-AB63-B3DD01BB2977

comment:
WAL-L710 PAR: Splash-Proof LED Par
Ambient and stage lighting with receiver unit compatible with Wireless Solution
With Wireless Solution receiver
For outdoor events, for lighting buildings and stages
Also ideal for TV and theatre due to its fanless design and flicker-free light
The bundled and homogeneous beam of light creates column-like effects on walls and buildings
With the optional, screw-on diffusion filter and the barndoors, the par can be easily and quickly adapted to meet new requirements and circumstances, and also converted into a wash light
Thanks to the Quick-Lock mount integrated into the bracket, the operation mode can be changed quickly from standing to suspended
The durable Seetronic connectors with protective caps complement the overall package of the tour-worthy LED spot
When using multiple WAL-L710s, power and DMX can easily be connected with suitable cables
For simple stand-alone operation, the spot offers an extensive and practical selection of colour macros and dynamic programs that can be adjusted in terms of speed and intensity
Light source: 7x 10W RGBW 4in1 LED
Beam angle: 10° Without filter
Nominal luminous flux: Max. 3616 lm
Colour temperature of the white light LED: 6500 K
Control: DMX (4/6/9 channels)
W-DMX receiver
Master / Slave, internal colour change and fade programs as well as static colours can be selected
Connections: DMX input and output: XLR 5-pin
Current input and output: Power Twist TR1
Power supply: 100 - 240 V ~ 50/60 Hz
Power consumption: Max. 70 Watt
Die-cast aluminium housing
Dimensions: 249 x 291 x 165 mm
Weight: 4.3 kg
Omega bracket with Quick-Lock function included
